Simulation generator

Create a new simulation

Describe the role and how you would judge a great hire. We assemble a structured, job-relevant simulation you can edit, save as a draft, or publish.

Role basics

The essentials that anchor the simulation.

Role context

What the job actually looks like day to day.

One per line or comma-separated.

Skills and evaluation

How you will judge the work. Comma or line separated.

Job-relevant only. Avoid protected-class or identity-based criteria.

Simulation style

The format the candidate experiences.

Simulation style

Fill in the role on the left and generate. Your editable preview, validation results, and save options will appear here.
